TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT COUNT(1) AS CNT_BASEL_CUST_ID, BASEL_CUST_ID as BASEL_CUST_ID FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT MTH_TM_ID, BASEL_CUST_ID FROM BASEL_CUST_ACCT_RLTNP_SNAPSHOT WHERE MTH_TM_ID>=$$TM_ID-80 AND MTH_TM_ID<=$$TM_ID ) A GROUP BY BASEL_CUST_ID

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT COUNT(1) AS CNT_BASEL_CUST_ID, BASEL_CUST_ID as BASEL_CUST_ID FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT MTH_TM_ID, BASEL_CUST_ID FROM BASEL_CUST_ACCT_RLTNP_SNAPSHOT WHERE MTH_TM_ID>=$$TM_ID-920 AND MTH_TM_ID<=$$TM_ID ) A GROUP BY BASEL_CUST_ID

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT MAX(GDAW.BASEL_CUST_MTH_DEP_TXN_SUM.TOT_DEP_AMT) as MAX_TOT_DEP_AMT, GDAW.BASEL_CUST_MTH_DEP_TXN_SUM.BASEL_CUST_ID as BASEL_CUST_ID FROM GDAW.BASEL_CUST_MTH_DEP_TXN_SUM WHERE GDAW.BASEL_CUST_MTH_DEP_TXN_SUM.MTH_TM_ID >= $$TM_ID-80 AND GDAW.BASEL_CUST_MTH_DEP_TXN_SUM.MTH_TM_ID <= $$TM_ID GROUP BY GDAW.BASEL_CUST_MTH_DEP_TXN_SUM.BASEL_CUST_ID

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE:
SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(ACTV_TRDS_CNT)=0 THEN NULL ELSE AVG(NVL(ACTV_TRDS_CNT,0)) END AS AVG_ACTV_TRDS_CNT, CASE WHEN COUNT(TOT_AVL_CR_NOT_UTILIZED_AMT)=0 THEN NULL ELSE AVG(NVL(TOT_AVL_CR_NOT_UTILIZED_AMT,0)) END AS AVG_TOT_AVL_CR_NOT_UTILIZED_AMT, BASEL_CUST_ID as BASEL_CUST_ID FROM GDAW.CR_BUREAU_DELI_MTH_SNAPSHOT WHERE MTH_TM_ID >= $$TM_ID-80 AND MTH_TM_ID <= $$TM_ID GROUP BY BASEL_CUST_ID
ORDER BY BASEL_CUST_ID --

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT SUM(GDAW.BASEL_MORT_ACCT_DRVD_VARS.OS_BAL_AMT) AS SUM_OS_BAL_AMT, GDAW.BASEL_MORT_ACCT_DRVD_VARS.BASEL_CUST_ID AS BASEL_CUST_ID FROM GDAW.BASEL_MORT_ACCT_DRVD_VARS WHERE ( GDAW.BASEL_MORT_ACCT_DRVD_VARS.MTH_TM_ID>=$$TM_ID-200 AND GDAW.BASEL_MORT_ACCT_DRVD_VARS.MTH_TM_ID<=$$TM_ID ) AND GDAW.BASEL_MORT_ACCT_DRVD_VARS.PIT_STAT_VER_1_CD='CUR' GROUP BY GDAW.BASEL_MORT_ACCT_DRVD_VARS.BASEL_CUST_ID

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT MAX(GDAW.CR_BUREAU_DELI_MTH_SNAPSHOT.TRADE_NEVER_DLQNT_PC) as MAX_TRADE_NEVER_DLQNT_PC, GDAW.CR_BUREAU_DELI_MTH_SNAPSHOT.BASEL_CUST_ID as BASEL_CUST_ID FROM GDAW.CR_BUREAU_DELI_MTH_SNAPSHOT WHERE GDAW.CR_BUREAU_DELI_MTH_SNAPSHOT.MTH_TM_ID >= $$TM_ID-920 AND GDAW.CR_BUREAU_DELI_MTH_SNAPSHOT.MTH_TM_ID <= $$TM_ID GROUP BY GDAW.CR_BUREAU_DELI_MTH_SNAPSHOT.BASEL_CUST_ID ORDER BY BASEL_CUST_ID --

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT SUM(GDAW.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_DRVD_VARS_WRK.TOT_NEW_BAL_AMT) AS SUM_OS_BAL_AMT, GDAW.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_DRVD_VARS_WRK.PRIM_BASEL_CUST_ID AS PRIM_BASEL_CUST_ID FROM GDAW.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_DRVD_VARS_WRK WHERE ( GDAW.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_DRVD_VARS_WRK.MTH_TM_ID>=$$TM_ID-200 AND GDAW.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_DRVD_VARS_WRK.MTH_TM_ID<=$$TM_ID ) AND GDAW.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_DRVD_VARS_WRK.PIT_STAT_VER_2_CD='CUR' GROUP BY GDAW.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_DRVD_VARS_WRK.PRIM_BASEL_CUST_ID

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT GDAW.CR_BUREAU_DELI_MTH_SNAPSHOT.TOT_HCCL_REVLVNG_AMT as TOT_HCCL_REVLVNG_AMT, GDAW.CR_BUREAU_DELI_MTH_SNAPSHOT.TOT_BAL_REVLVNG_AMT as TOT_BAL_REVLVNG_AMT, GDAW.CR_BUREAU_DELI_MTH_SNAPSHOT.BASEL_CUST_ID as BASEL_CUST_ID FROM GDAW.CR_BUREAU_DELI_MTH_SNAPSHOT WHERE GDAW.CR_BUREAU_DELI_MTH_SNAPSHOT.MTH_TM_ID=$$TM_ID ORDER BY BASEL_CUST_ID --

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(INQRY_PAST_6_MTH_CNT)=0 THEN NULL ELSE SUM(NVL(INQRY_PAST_6_MTH_CNT,0)) END AS SUM_INQRY_PAST_6_MTH_CNT, BASEL_CUST_ID as BASEL_CUST_ID FROM GDAW.CR_BUREAU_DELI_MTH_SNAPSHOT WHERE MTH_TM_ID >= $$TM_ID-920 AND MTH_TM_ID <= $$TM_ID GROUP BY BASEL_CUST_ID ORDER BY BASEL_CUST_ID --

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT SUM(GDAW.BASEL_PSNL_LOAN_ACCT_DRVD_VARS.OS_BAL_AMT) AS SUM_OS_BAL_AMT, GDAW.BASEL_PSNL_LOAN_ACCT_DRVD_VARS.BASEL_CUST_ID AS BASEL_CUST_ID FROM GDAW.BASEL_PSNL_LOAN_ACCT_DRVD_VARS WHERE ( GDAW.BASEL_PSNL_LOAN_ACCT_DRVD_VARS.MTH_TM_ID>=$$TM_ID-200 AND GDAW.BASEL_PSNL_LOAN_ACCT_DRVD_VARS.MTH_TM_ID<=$$TM_ID ) AND GDAW.BASEL_PSNL_LOAN_ACCT_DRVD_VARS.PIT_STAT_VER_1_CD='CUR' GROUP BY GDAW.BASEL_PSNL_LOAN_ACCT_DRVD_VARS.BASEL_CUST_ID

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(D2D_BAL_AMT)=0 THEN NULL ELSE SUM(NVL(D2D_BAL_AMT,0)) END AS SUM_D2D_BAL_AMT, BASEL_CUST_ID as BASEL_CUST_ID FROM GDAW.BASEL_CUST_MTH_POSTN_SUM_FACT WHERE MTH_TM_ID >= $$TM_ID-80 AND MTH_TM_ID <= $$TM_ID GROUP BY BASEL_CUST_ID

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT MAX(GDAW.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_MTH_SNAPSHOT.BNS_DLQNT_DAY) as MAX_BNS_DLQNT_DAY, GDAW.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_MTH_SNAPSHOT.PRIM_BASEL_CUST_ID as PRIM_BASEL_CUST_ID FROM GDAW.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_MTH_SNAPSHOT WHERE GDAW.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_MTH_SNAPSHOT.MTH_TM_ID >= $$TM_ID-200 AND GDAW.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_MTH_SNAPSHOT.MTH_TM_ID <= $$TM_ID GROUP BY GDAW.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_MTH_SNAPSHOT.PRIM_BASEL_CUST_ID

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT BASEL_CUST_ID AS BASEL_CUST_ID, TRIM(CIF_KEY) AS CIF_KEY, TRIM(CUST_CID) AS CUST_CID, TRIM(CUST_TP_CD) AS CUST_TP_CD, TRIM(CIS_PURGED_F) AS CIS_PURGED_F, CIS_PURGED_DT AS CIS_PURGED_DT, IP_ID AS IP_ID FROM GDAW.BASEL_CUST_DIM ORDER BY BASEL_CUST_ID --

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Sql Query
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE:
SELECT A.MTH_TM_ID, A.PRIM_BASEL_CUST_ID FROM GDAW.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_MTH_SNAPSHOT A ,GDAW.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_BASE_DRVD_VARS ADV WHERE A.PRIM_BASEL_CUST_ID IS NOT NULL AND A.PRIM_BASEL_CUST_ID <> '-1' AND A.MTH_TM_ID=$$TM_ID AND ADV.MTH_TM_ID=$$TM_ID AND A.BASEL_ACCT_ID=ADV.BASEL_ACCT_ID AND ADV.SML_BUS_F='N' AND ADV.CONSM_PRD_TREATMNT_CD='A'
UNION
SELECT B.MTH_TM_ID, B.PRIM_BASEL_CUST_ID FROM GDAW.BASEL_MORT_MTH_SNAPSHOT B, GDAW.BASEL_MORT_ACCT_DRVD_VARS BDV WHERE B.PRIM_BASEL_CUST_ID IS NOT NULL AND B.PRIM_BASEL_CUST_ID <> '-1' AND B.MTH_TM_ID=$$TM_ID AND BDV.MTH_TM_ID=$$TM_ID AND B.BASEL_ACCT_ID=BDV.BASEL_ACCT_ID AND BDV.CONSM_PRD_TREATMNT_CD='A'
UNION
SELECT C.MTH_TM_ID, C.PRIM_BASEL_CUST_ID FROM GDAW.BASEL_PSNL_LOAN_MTH_SNAPSHOT C, GDAW.BASEL_PSNL_LOAN_ACCT_DRVD_VARS CDV WHERE C.PRIM_BASEL_CUST_ID IS NOT NULL AND C.PRIM_BASEL_CUST_ID <> '-1' AND C.MTH_TM_ID=$$TM_ID AND CDV.MTH_TM_ID=$$TM_ID AND C.BASEL_ACCT_ID=CDV.BASEL_ACCT_ID AND CDV.CONSM_PRD_TREATMNT_CD='A'
ORDER BY PRIM_BASEL_CUST_ID

TRANSFORMFIELD.EXPRESSION:
IIF(v_CUSTACCT_3MTH_AGE=0 OR ISNULL(v_AVG_3_MTH_D2D_BAL_AMT), NULL, v_AVG_3_MTH_D2D_BAL_AMT/v_CUSTACCT_3MTH_AGE)
--rolledback to above logic --:LKP.LKP_BASEL_PRIM_CUST_MTH_POSTN_SUM_FACT_GET_AVG_D2D_BAL_AMT(PRIM_BASEL_CUST_ID)
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: o_AVG_3_MTH_D2D_BAL_AMT

TRANSFORMFIELD.EXPRESSION: IIF(ISNULL(v_BASEL_CUST_CID), ABORT('BASEL_CUST_CID: ' || v_BASEL_CUST_CID || 'IS NOT FOUND IN THE BASEL_CUST_DIM'), v_BASEL_CUST_CID)
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: o_BASEL_CUST_CID

TRANSFORMFIELD.EXPRESSION: IIF(ISNULL(PRIM_BASEL_CUST_ID), NULL, IIF(lkp_TOT_HCCL_REVLVNG_AMT=0 OR ISNULL(lkp_TOT_HCCL_REVLVNG_AMT) OR ISNULL(lkp_TOT_BAL_REVLVNG_AMT), 0, lkp_TOT_BAL_REVLVNG_AMT/lkp_TOT_HCCL_REVLVNG_AMT))
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: o_TOT_REVLVNG_TRADE_UTLTN_RTO

TRANSFORMFIELD.EXPRESSION: IIF(v_FINAL_CNT_Age_24mths = 0 OR ISNULL(v_FINAL_CNT_Age_24mths) OR ISNULL(v_AVG_INQRY_PAST_6_MTH_CNT), NULL, v_AVG_INQRY_PAST_6_MTH_CNT / v_FINAL_CNT_Age_24mths)
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: o_AVG_INQRY_PAST_6_MTH_CNT

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE:
SELECT SUM(A.ACTV_TRDS_CNT) AS AVG_ACTV_TRDS_CNT, SUM(A.TOT_AVL_CR_NOT_UTILIZED_AMT) AS AVG_TOT_AVL_CR_NOT_UTILIZED_AMT, A.BASEL_CUST_ID as BASEL_CUST_ID FROM GDAW.CR_BUREAU_DELI_MTH_SNAPSHOT A
JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT A.BASEL_CUST_ID, A.MTH_TM_ID FROM GDAW.BASEL_CUST_ACCT_RLTNP_SNAPSHOT A WHERE (A.MTH_TM_ID >= $$TM_ID-80 AND A.MTH_TM_ID <= $$TM_ID) )B ON A.BASEL_CUST_ID=B.BASEL_CUST_ID AND (A.MTH_TM_ID >= $$TM_ID-80 AND A.MTH_TM_ID <= $$TM_ID) AND A.MTH_TM_ID=B.MTH_TM_ID
GROUP BY A.BASEL_CUST_ID ORDER BY A.BASEL_CUST_ID --

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE:
SELECT SUM(A.INQRY_PAST_6_MTH_CNT) AS SUM_INQRY_PAST_6_MTH_CNT, A.BASEL_CUST_ID as BASEL_CUST_ID FROM GDAW.CR_BUREAU_DELI_MTH_SNAPSHOT A
JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT A.BASEL_CUST_ID, A.MTH_TM_ID FROM GDAW.BASEL_CUST_ACCT_RLTNP_SNAPSHOT A WHERE (A.MTH_TM_ID >= $$TM_ID-920 AND A.MTH_TM_ID <= $$TM_ID) )B ON A.BASEL_CUST_ID=B.BASEL_CUST_ID AND (A.MTH_TM_ID >= $$TM_ID-920 AND A.MTH_TM_ID <= $$TM_ID) AND A.MTH_TM_ID=B.MTH_TM_ID
GROUP BY A.BASEL_CUST_ID ORDER BY A.BASEL_CUST_ID --

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE:
SELECT SUM(A.D2D_BAL_AMT) AS SUM_D2D_BAL_AMT, A.BASEL_CUST_ID as BASEL_CUST_ID FROM GDAW.BASEL_CUST_MTH_POSTN_SUM_FACT A
JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT A.BASEL_CUST_ID, A.MTH_TM_ID FROM GDAW.BASEL_CUST_ACCT_RLTNP_SNAPSHOT A WHERE (A.MTH_TM_ID >= $$TM_ID-80 AND A.MTH_TM_ID <= $$TM_ID) )B ON A.BASEL_CUST_ID=B.BASEL_CUST_ID AND (A.MTH_TM_ID >= $$TM_ID-80 AND A.MTH_TM_ID <= $$TM_ID) AND A.MTH_TM_ID=B.MTH_TM_ID
GROUP BY A.BASEL_CUST_ID ORDER BY A.BASEL_CUST_ID--

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT TRIM(BASEL_CUST_ID) AS BASEL_CUST_ID, TRIM(CIF_KEY) AS CIF_KEY, TRIM(CUST_CID) AS CUST_CID, TRIM(CUST_TP_CD) AS CUST_TP_CD, TRIM(CIS_PURGED_F) AS CIS_PURGED_F, CIS_PURGED_DT AS CIS_PURGED_DT, IP_ID AS IP_ID FROM GDAW.BASEL_CUST_DIM ORDER BY BASEL_CUST_ID --

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Maximum Memory Allowed For Auto Memory Attributes
Maximum Percentage of Total Memory Allowed For Auto Memory Attributes
Additional Concurrent Pipelines for Lookup Cache Creation
Save session log for these runs
Session Log File Max Time Period

TASK.DESCRIPTION:
IFDYN-C-0-4
(where the main script is called from) $$SCRIPT_DIR=/owdev/scripts (the environment; DEV, SYS, UAT, PROD) $$ENVMNT=DEV (the project folder without prefix) $$PROJ_FOLDR=STGN_SCENE (the workflow and session name for the abend log file and triger) $$WRKFLW_SESS=wf_STGN_SCENE_Load_DIMs.s_STGN_SCENE_INS_UPD_SCENE_MBR_ACCT_ACTY_TP_DIM
TASK.NAME: cmd_post_session_failure_alert

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Fail task if any command fails

WORKFLOW.DESCRIPTION:
IFDYN-W-0-6
These workflows are created from the Workflow Generation Wizard.
WORKFLOW.NAME: wf_DM_IFRS_Load_BASEL_CUST_SCORECRD_DRVD_VARS

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Sql Query
ATTRIBUTE.VALUE:
SELECT A.MTH_TM_ID, A.PRIM_BASEL_CUST_ID FROM $$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_MTH_SNAPSHOT A ,$$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_BASE_DRVD_VARS ADV WHERE A.PRIM_BASEL_CUST_ID IS NOT NULL AND A.PRIM_BASEL_CUST_ID <> '-1' AND A.MTH_TM_ID=$$TM_ID AND ADV.MTH_TM_ID=$$TM_ID AND A.BASEL_ACCT_ID=ADV.BASEL_ACCT_ID AND ADV.SML_BUS_F='N' AND ADV.CONSM_PRD_TREATMNT_CD='A'
UNION
SELECT B.MTH_TM_ID, B.PRIM_BASEL_CUST_ID FROM $$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_MORT_MTH_SNAPSHOT B, $$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_MORT_ACCT_DRVD_VARS BDV WHERE B.PRIM_BASEL_CUST_ID IS NOT NULL AND B.PRIM_BASEL_CUST_ID <> '-1' AND B.MTH_TM_ID=$$TM_ID AND BDV.MTH_TM_ID=$$TM_ID AND B.BASEL_ACCT_ID=BDV.BASEL_ACCT_ID AND BDV.CONSM_PRD_TREATMNT_CD='A'
UNION
SELECT C.MTH_TM_ID, C.PRIM_BASEL_CUST_ID FROM $$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_PSNL_LOAN_MTH_SNAPSHOT C, $$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_PSNL_LOAN_ACCT_DRVD_VARS CDV WHERE C.PRIM_BASEL_CUST_ID IS NOT NULL AND C.PRIM_BASEL_CUST_ID <> '-1' AND C.MTH_TM_ID=$$TM_ID AND CDV.MTH_TM_ID=$$TM_ID AND C.BASEL_ACCT_ID=CDV.BASEL_ACCT_ID AND CDV.CONSM_PRD_TREATMNT_CD='A'
ORDER BY PRIM_BASEL_CUST_ID

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
ATTRIBUTE.VALUE:
SELECT SUM(A.ACTV_TRDS_CNT) AS AVG_ACTV_TRDS_CNT, SUM(A.TOT_AVL_CR_NOT_UTILIZED_AMT) AS AVG_TOT_AVL_CR_NOT_UTILIZED_AMT, A.BASEL_CUST_ID as BASEL_CUST_ID FROM $$TBL_PRE_4.CR_BUREAU_DELI_MTH_SNAPSHOT A
JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT A.BASEL_CUST_ID, A.MTH_TM_ID FROM $$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_CUST_ACCT_RLTNP_SNAPSHOT A WHERE (A.MTH_TM_ID >= $$TM_ID-80 AND A.MTH_TM_ID <= $$TM_ID) )B ON A.BASEL_CUST_ID=B.BASEL_CUST_ID AND (A.MTH_TM_ID >= $$TM_ID-80 AND A.MTH_TM_ID <= $$TM_ID) AND A.MTH_TM_ID=B.MTH_TM_ID
GROUP BY A.BASEL_CUST_ID ORDER BY A.BASEL_CUST_ID --

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
ATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT MAX(TRADE_NEVER_DLQNT_PC) as MAX_TRADE_NEVER_DLQNT_PC, BASEL_CUST_ID as BASEL_CUST_ID FROM $$TBL_PRE_4.CR_BUREAU_DELI_MTH_SNAPSHOT WHERE $$TBL_PRE_4.CR_BUREAU_DELI_MTH_SNAPSHOT.MTH_TM_ID >= $$TM_ID-920 AND $$TBL_PRE_4.CR_BUREAU_DELI_MTH_SNAPSHOT.MTH_TM_ID <= $$TM_ID GROUP BY BASEL_CUST_ID ORDER BY BASEL_CUST_ID --

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
ATTRIBUTE.VALUE:
SELECT SUM(A.D2D_BAL_AMT) AS SUM_D2D_BAL_AMT, A.BASEL_CUST_ID as BASEL_CUST_ID FROM $$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_CUST_MTH_POSTN_SUM_FACT A
JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT A.BASEL_CUST_ID, A.MTH_TM_ID FROM $$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_CUST_ACCT_RLTNP_SNAPSHOT A WHERE (A.MTH_TM_ID >= $$TM_ID-80 AND A.MTH_TM_ID <= $$TM_ID) )B ON A.BASEL_CUST_ID=B.BASEL_CUST_ID AND (A.MTH_TM_ID >= $$TM_ID-80 AND A.MTH_TM_ID <= $$TM_ID) AND A.MTH_TM_ID=B.MTH_TM_ID
GROUP BY A.BASEL_CUST_ID ORDER BY A.BASEL_CUST_ID--

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
ATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN (BNS_DLQNT_DAY-30)<0 THEN 0 ELSE (BNS_DLQNT_DAY-30) END) as MAX_BNS_DLQNT_DAY, PRIM_BASEL_CUST_ID as PRIM_BASEL_CUST_ID FROM $$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_MTH_SNAPSHOT WHERE MTH_TM_ID >= $$TM_ID-200 AND MTH_TM_ID <= $$TM_ID GROUP BY PRIM_BASEL_CUST_ID

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
ATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT TRIM(BASEL_CUST_ID) AS BASEL_CUST_ID, TRIM(CIF_KEY) AS CIF_KEY, TRIM(CUST_CID) AS CUST_CID, TRIM(CUST_TP_CD) AS CUST_TP_CD, TRIM(CIS_PURGED_F) AS CIS_PURGED_F, CIS_PURGED_DT AS CIS_PURGED_DT, IP_ID AS IP_ID FROM $$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_CUST_DIM ORDER BY BASEL_CUST_ID --

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
ATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT TOT_HCCL_REVLVNG_AMT as TOT_HCCL_REVLVNG_AMT, TOT_BAL_REVLVNG_AMT as TOT_BAL_REVLVNG_AMT, BASEL_CUST_ID as BASEL_CUST_ID FROM $$TBL_PRE_4.CR_BUREAU_DELI_MTH_SNAPSHOT WHERE MTH_TM_ID=$$TM_ID ORDER BY BASEL_CUST_ID --

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
ATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT MAX(TOT_DEP_AMT) as MAX_TOT_DEP_AMT, BASEL_CUST_ID as BASEL_CUST_ID FROM $$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_CUST_MTH_DEP_TXN_SUM WHERE MTH_TM_ID >= $$TM_ID-80 AND MTH_TM_ID <= $$TM_ID GROUP BY BASEL_CUST_ID

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
ATTRIBUTE.VALUE:
SELECT SUM(A.INQRY_PAST_6_MTH_CNT) AS SUM_INQRY_PAST_6_MTH_CNT, A.BASEL_CUST_ID as BASEL_CUST_ID FROM $$TBL_PRE_4.CR_BUREAU_DELI_MTH_SNAPSHOT A
JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT A.BASEL_CUST_ID, A.MTH_TM_ID FROM $$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_CUST_ACCT_RLTNP_SNAPSHOT A WHERE (A.MTH_TM_ID >= $$TM_ID-920 AND A.MTH_TM_ID <= $$TM_ID) )B ON A.BASEL_CUST_ID=B.BASEL_CUST_ID AND (A.MTH_TM_ID >= $$TM_ID-920 AND A.MTH_TM_ID <= $$TM_ID) AND A.MTH_TM_ID=B.MTH_TM_ID
GROUP BY A.BASEL_CUST_ID ORDER BY A.BASEL_CUST_ID --

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
ATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT SUM(TOT_NEW_BAL_AMT) AS SUM_OS_BAL_AMT, PRIM_BASEL_CUST_ID AS PRIM_BASEL_CUST_ID FROM $$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_DRVD_VARS_WRK WHERE ( MTH_TM_ID>=$$TM_ID-200 AND MTH_TM_ID<=$$TM_ID ) AND PIT_STAT_VER_2_CD='CUR' GROUP BY PRIM_BASEL_CUST_ID

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
ATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT SUM(OS_BAL_AMT) AS SUM_OS_BAL_AMT, BASEL_CUST_ID AS BASEL_CUST_ID FROM $$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_MORT_ACCT_DRVD_VARS WHERE ( MTH_TM_ID>=$$TM_ID-200 AND MTH_TM_ID<=$$TM_ID ) AND PIT_STAT_VER_1_CD='CUR' GROUP BY BASEL_CUST_ID

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
ATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT SUM(OS_BAL_AMT) AS SUM_OS_BAL_AMT, BASEL_CUST_ID AS BASEL_CUST_ID FROM $$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_PSNL_LOAN_ACCT_DRVD_VARS WHERE ( MTH_TM_ID>=$$TM_ID-200 AND MTH_TM_ID<=$$TM_ID ) AND PIT_STAT_VER_1_CD='CUR' GROUP BY BASEL_CUST_ID

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
ATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT MAX(TRADE_NEVER_DLQNT_PC) as MAX_TRADE_NEVER_DLQNT_PC, BASEL_CUST_ID as BASEL_CUST_ID FROM $$TBL_PRE_4.CR_BUREAU_DELI_MTH_SNAPSHOT WHERE MTH_TM_ID >= $$TM_ID-920 AND MTH_TM_ID <= $$TM_ID GROUP BY BASEL_CUST_ID ORDER BY BASEL_CUST_ID --

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
ATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT COUNT(1) AS CNT_BASEL_CUST_ID, BASEL_CUST_ID as BASEL_CUST_ID FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT MTH_TM_ID, BASEL_CUST_ID FROM $$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_CUST_ACCT_RLTNP_SNAPSHOT WHERE MTH_TM_ID>=$$TM_ID-80 AND MTH_TM_ID<=$$TM_ID ) A GROUP BY BASEL_CUST_ID

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
ATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT COUNT(1) AS CNT_BASEL_CUST_ID, BASEL_CUST_ID as BASEL_CUST_ID FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT MTH_TM_ID, BASEL_CUST_ID FROM $$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_CUST_ACCT_RLTNP_SNAPSHOT WHERE MTH_TM_ID>=$$TM_ID-920 AND MTH_TM_ID<=$$TM_ID ) A GROUP BY BASEL_CUST_ID

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Fail task if any command fails
Fail task if any command fails
Fail task if any command fails
Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections
Post SQL
ATTRIBUTE.VALUE: INSERT INTO $$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_DRVD_VARS_WRK SELECT DR.MTH_TM_ID, DR.BASEL_ACCT_ID, DR.ACCT_NUM, TRIM( DR.BASEL_PRD_CD), TRIM(DR.CONSM_SCORECRD_EXCLSN_F), TRIM(DR.CONSM_PRD_TREATMNT_CD), DR.HELOC_F, TRIM(DR.PIT_STAT_VER_2_CD), DR.RS_F, DR.SML_BUS_F, DR.STEP_CD, DR.TRNST_EXCLSN_F, RSN.PRIM_BASEL_CUST_ID, RSN.STEP_PLN_SNAPSHOT_ID, RSN.TRNST_NUM, TRIM(RSN.PRD_CD), RTRIM(RSN.BLOCK_RECL_CD), TRIM(RSN.ACCT_STAT_CD), RSN.CR_LMT_AMT, TRIM(RSN.CHRG_OFF_CD), RSN.LAST_PYMT_DT, RSN.TOT_NEW_BAL_AMT, RSN.BNS_DLQNT_DAY, RSN.STEP_PLN_AGRMNT_NUM , LKP.LTV_TP_CD, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM $$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_MTH_SNAPSHOT RSN, $$TBL_PRE_4.BASEL_REVLVNG_CR_BASE_DRVD_VARS DR, $$TBL_PRE_4.SRC_PRD_LKP LKP WHERE DR.MTH_TM_ID=RSN.MTH_TM_ID AND DR.BASEL_ACCT_ID=RSN.BASEL_ACCT_ID AND RSN.PRD_CD=LKP.SRC_PRD_CD AND RSN.SUB_PRD_CD=LKP.SRC_SUB_PRD_CD AND LKP.PRD_SYS_CD='KS' AND DR.SML_BUS_F='N' AND LKP.CRNT_F='Y' AND DR.MTH_TM_ID>=$$TM_ID-$$NUM AND DR.MTH_TM_ID<=$$TM_ID

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Fail task if any command fails
Fail task if any command fails
Fail task if any command fails
Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections

Fail task if any command fails
Fail task if any command fails

Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_DM_RRAP_Ins_BASEL_CUST_SCORECRD_DRVD_VARS.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Write Backward Compatible Workflow Log File
Save workflow log for these runs
Allow concurrent run with unique run instance name
Allow concurrent run with same run instance name
Maximum number of concurrent runs per Hub

FOLDER.NAME: SHARED
FOLDER.DESCRIPTION: Where all shared objects will reside. Only save sources, targets, transformations and mapplets in this folder. Never save any mappings in here!!!!
